question: HIPAA protects a category of information known as protected health information (PHI). PHI includes:
canonical_answer: An organizational IRB or Privacy Board, privacy officer ("Privacy Officer"), or privacy official ("Privacy Official"), depending on the issue.

appears_in.title: Hipaa Authorization Has Which Of The Following Characteristics
appears_in.answer: An organizational IRB or Privacy Board, privacy officer ("Privacy Officer"), or privacy official ("Privacy Official"), depending on the issue.

appears_in.title: Hipaa Includes In Its Definition Of Research
appears_in.answer: identifiable health information that is created or held by covered entities and their business associates.

appears_in.title: Hipaa Recruiting Into Research
appears_in.answer: Identifiable health information that is created or held by covered entities and their business associates.

appears_in.title: Hipaa Retrospective Research
appears_in.answer: identifiable health information that is created or held by covered entities and their business associates.

appears_in.title: Under Hipaa Disclosure Accounting Is Required
appears_in.answer: identifiable health information that is created or held by covered entities and their business associates.
